# Sunny Patel — Independent SEO Consultant (Full Reference)

> Comprehensive index of sunnypatel.co.uk. Sunny Patel is an independent SEO consultant based in Reading, Berkshire, UK, specialising in semantic SEO, topical authority, entity SEO, technical SEO, and AI search optimisation (GEO) for UK businesses. 15+ years experience. Free 30-minute consultation. Contact: Hello@SunnyPatel.co.uk · 07305 523333.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/)

- [Blog](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/)
- [Free SEO Tools](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/tools/)
- [Contact](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/contact/)

## Services (71)

- [AI Search Optimisation](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/ai-search-optimisation/): AI search optimisation services to ensure your brand appears in ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, and Perplexity results. Future-proof your visibility as search shifts to AI.
- [Affordable SEO Consultant](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/affordable-seo-consultant/): Affordable SEO consultant delivering senior-level strategy without agency pricing. Technical audits, content strategy, and organic growth scaled to your budget. Free consultation.
- [Amazon SEO Consultant](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/amazon-seo-consultant/): Amazon SEO consultant helping sellers optimise listings, improve search rankings, and increase organic sales on Amazon UK and Amazon.com. Free consultation.
- [B2B Content Marketing: Strategy Guide](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/b2b-content-marketing-services/): B2B content marketing strategy that works. Education-first content for complex sales cycles. Learn what actually works.
- [B2B SEO](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/b2b-seo/): B2B SEO services that drive qualified leads through organic search. Specialist SEO strategies for SaaS, professional services, manufacturing, and B2B companies.
- [Content Briefs](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/content-briefs/): What is an SEO Content Brief? An SEO content brief is a detailed specification document that guides writers to produce semantically optimised content.
- [Dental SEO](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/dental-seo/): Specialist dental SEO services to help dentists and dental practices attract new patients through local search, Google Maps, and organic visibility.
- [Digital Marketing Reading](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/digital-marketing-reading/): Digital marketing in Reading, Berkshire. Content marketing, paid media, and data-driven growth for Thames Valley businesses. Free consultation.

Scalable technical SEO, cross-team coordination, and content architecture that aligns stakeholders. 15+ yrs experience. Free strategy call.

- [Google Algorithm Update Recovery](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/google-algorithm-update-recovery/): Google penalty recovery and algorithm update recovery services. Diagnose manual actions, algorithmic penalties, and ranking drops — then build a recovery strategy that restores your organic traffic.
- [Hire an SEO Consultant](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/hire-seo-consultant/): Hire an experienced SEO consultant for your business. Senior-level SEO strategy, technical audits, and topical authority building with no agency overhead. Free consultation available.
- [How Much Does SEO Cost](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/how-much-does-seo-cost/): UK SEO costs in 2026: audits from £500, retainers from £1,500/mo, content briefs from £150. Real pricing from an independent consultant — no hidden fees, no contracts.
- [Internal Linking](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/internal-linking/): What is Internal Linking Strategy? Internal linking strategy creates hub-and-spoke architectures that distribute ranking signals effectively.
- [International SEO Consultant](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/international-seo-consultant/): International SEO consultant helping UK businesses expand globally. Hreflang implementation, multi-market keyword strategy, and technical SEO for international domains. Free consultation.
- [Keyword Research](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/keyword-research/): What is Keyword Research? Keyword research identifies search demand, clusters queries by intent, and prioritises opportunities based on competition and business value.
- [Legal SEO Magic Circle Firms](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/legal-seo-magic-circle-firms-2/): When your clients are Fortune 500 CEOs, sovereign wealth funds, and governments, your digital presence must reflect uncompromising excellence whilst navigating complex ethical constraints of legal marketing.

- [On-Page SEO](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/on-page-seo/): What is On-Page SEO? On-page SEO refines existing content for improved relevance and featured snippet eligibility. The service optimises title tags, meta descriptions, heading hierarchy, and content structure.

- [Technical SEO Services](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/technical-seo-services/): Technical SEO services covering site speed, crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, and structured data. Fix the technical foundations that hold your rankings back.
- [Topical Authority](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/topical-authority/): What is Topical Authority? Topical authority is a ranking state where search engines recognise a website as an authoritative source for a specific topic or subject area.
- [Topical Maps](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/topical-maps/): A topical map is a strategic content architecture that organises topics around a central entity to build topical authority.

## Case Studies (12)

- [Aatma Aesthetics Website Design Development and SEO](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/aatma-aesthetics-website-design-development-seo/): How Sunny Patel helped Aatma Aesthetics grow organic visibility and attract high-quality enquiries through a full website redesign and semantic SEO strategy.
- [Cross-Platform SEO Audit — Bing vs Google Performance Analysis](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/cross-platform-seo-audit-bing-vs-google/): A deep-dive cross-platform audit comparing Bing and Google performance across 11 sites, uncovering a 107x traffic gap, dangerous platform dependency, and over £810 per year in missed Google revenue.
- [Professional Services Firm — Reading — 3× Enquiry Growth](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/professional-services-reading-seo-growth/): How a Reading professional services firm went from 180 organic visits per month to 620 in 9 months — with monthly enquiries from organic search tripling. Topical authority strategy in a competitive local market.
- [SEO Methodology at Scale — 45-Site Testing Portfolio](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/niche-affiliate-seo-portfolio-45-sites/): How running a 45-site SEO portfolio across 12 verticals provides a live testing environment for the semantic SEO methodology applied to client work — with real data, real rankings, and real revenue consequences.
- [Technical Content Authority at Scale](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/technical-content-authority-at-scale/): How a single technical how-to guide generated over 31,000 AI search citations, and how a content-first strategy built a technology troubleshooting authority with 67,000+ total AI citations.
- [AI Search Optimisation — 120K Copilot Citations](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/ai-search-optimisation-copilot-citations/): How structured, research-backed content across a niche site portfolio generated over 120,000 Bing AI Copilot citations — with a single page earning 31,377 citations alone — revealing the content patterns that AI search engines prefer to reference.
- [Affiliate Conversion Optimisation — UGC Content Strategy](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/affiliate-conversion-optimisation-ugc-strategy/): How a UGC-driven content strategy and semantic SEO audit lifted affiliate conversion rates to 6.51 percent and achieved 25.72 percent CTR — turning underperforming review content into high-converting affiliate pages.
- [Automotive Tech Review Authority](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/automotive-tech-review-authority/): How a focused content strategy built an automotive technology review authority with a 10.16% organic CTR and nearly 9,000 AI search citations — proving that niche expertise beats broad coverage.
- [Health and Wellness Product SEO Authority](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/health-wellness-product-seo-authority/): How semantic SEO and research-backed content transformed a health and wellness product review site into a category authority — achieving a 25.72% click-through rate and over 24,000 AI search citations.
- [Micro-Niche Conversion Optimisation](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/micro-niche-conversion-optimisation/): How a small pet products review site achieved a 6.51% affiliate conversion rate — 5x the portfolio average — and a £3.79 earnings-per-click through precision content targeting and high-intent semantic SEO.
- [Outdoor and Garden Product Review SEO](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/outdoor-garden-product-review-seo/): How a focused semantic SEO strategy turned an outdoor and garden equipment review site into the top-earning affiliate property in a 45-site portfolio, generating consistent monthly revenue through high-intent product content.
- [TheTutorLink — EdTech Platform Growth](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/thetutor-link-edtech-platform-growth/): How TheTutorLink, an online tutoring marketplace, achieved 600 percent organic traffic growth through technical SEO, platform optimisation, and a dual-domain strategy targeting both the marketing site and web application.

- [Increase Organic Traffic](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/increase-organic-traffic/): Most advice on increasing organic traffic focuses on tactics lacking strategic context. Here's the systematic approach that actually works.
- [In-House SEO vs Agency vs Consultant](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/inhouse-seo-vs-agency-vs-consultant/): In-house (£44K-£71K) vs agency (£18K-£60K) vs consultant (£12K-£48K). Which SEO model beats the others? UK cost breakdown, ROI analysis, and the hybrid model high-growth companies use.
- [Intent Competition Data](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/intent-competition-data/): Unlocking Keyword Success: Going Beyond Search Volume. When it comes to keyword research for SEO, relying solely on search volume may not provide the complete picture.
- [Local SEO Berkshire Guide](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/local-seo-berkshire-guide/): Local SEO guide for Berkshire businesses. Rank in Google Maps across Reading, Wokingham, Slough and Bracknell. GBP setup, reviews and citations explained.
- [46 Local SEO Statistics 2026](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/local-seo-statistics/): 46 local SEO statistics: near-me searches, map pack rankings, customer visits. Get proven benchmarks for local search dominance today.
- [Managing 44 Websites SEO Data](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/managing-44-websites-seo-data/): Real Google Search Console data from managing a portfolio of 44 websites. Canonical splitting, title truncation at scale, page pruning results, and what most agencies won't tell you about multi-site SEO.
- [Optimise Content for AI Search](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/optimise-content-for-ai-search/): Practical guide to optimising content for Bing Copilot, ChatGPT Search, and Google AI Overviews. Learn the 7 content patterns that earn AI citations.
- [Optimise Multiple Keywords](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/optimise-multiple-keywords/): Are you looking to boost your website's visibility and attract more readers? One effective strategy is to integrate long-tail keywords into your blog posts.
- [What Happens to SEO After You Acquire a Business](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-after-acquisition/): Organic traffic drops 10-30% after most acquisitions. I've managed 44 sites through ownership changes — here's the 90-day plan to protect your rankings.
- [How to Tell If Your SEO Agency Is Lying to You](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-agency-lying/): I've audited sites managed by agencies for years with zero growth. Here are the red flags in their reports and 5 questions to ask right now.
- [SEO Consultant vs Agency — Which Is Right for Your Business?](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-consultant-vs-agency/): Independent SEO consultants consistently outperform agencies for SMEs — lower cost, direct expert access, and no account manager layer. Sunny Patel explains the difference with data.
- [SEO Consultant vs SEO Agency](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-consultant-vs-seo-agency/): SEO consultant vs SEO agency — an honest comparison. Who does the work, what you pay for, which model delivers better ROI, and how to decide based on your budget and goals.
- [SEO Due Diligence Investors](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-due-diligence-investors/): I manage 44 websites. Here's what sellers hide about organic traffic — and the 5 Google Search Console checks every investor should run before signing.
- [SEO for Multiple Websites](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-for-multiple-websites/): I manage 44 websites across 15+ niches. Here's the multi-site SEO system I use to stop them cannibalising each other, fix shared technical debt, and prioritise which sites get attention first.
- [SEO Metrics Your Board Should Actually See](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-metrics-for-boards/): Most SEO reports sent to boards are useless. Here are the 5 metrics that actually predict whether SEO is working — from someone who reports on 44 sites.
- [SEO Mistakes](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-mistakes/): Most websites lose rankings through preventable mistakes. Here are 9 issues I find during audits, with fixes you can implement today.
- [SEO Semantic Markup Guide](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-semantic-markup-guide/): Complete guide to semantic markup for SEO. Learn how structured data, schema markup, and semantic HTML improve search visibility and enable rich results.
- [SEO Statistics UK](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-statistics-uk/): SEO statistics UK 2026: Position 1 gets 27.6% CTR, 825% average ROI. 85+ verified data insights. Build your SEO business case with data today.
- [SEO vs Paid Ads Where to Spend First](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-vs-paid-ads/): Data-backed framework for choosing SEO vs PPC based on your stage, budget, and timeline. Includes a 12-month CAC comparison from 44 real sites.
- [Technical SEO vs On-Page SEO](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/technical-seo-vs-on-page-seo/): Technical SEO and on-page SEO are often confused. Learn exactly what each covers, which one your site needs most, and how they work together to improve rankings.
- [Topical Authority vs Domain Authority](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/topical-authority-vs-domain-authority/): Domain Authority is a third-party metric. Topical authority is what Google actually measures. Learn the difference and why most SEO campaigns focus on the wrong one.
- [How to Value a Website by Its Organic Traffic](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/value-website-organic-traffic/): Monthly organic revenue × multiplier isn't enough. Here's how to calculate real organic traffic value using GSC data, not broker vanity metrics.
- [Website Redesign SEO Checklist](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/website-redesign-seo-checklist/): The exact checklist I use across 44 websites to protect organic traffic during redesigns. Before, during, and after steps to avoid ranking drops.
- [What is a Content Brief](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/what-is-a-content-brief/): A content brief is the document that separates content that ranks from content that doesn't. Includes a free content brief template, real examples, and a breakdown of every field your briefs need to produce ranking content.
- [What is E-E-A-T in SEO](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/what-is-eeat-seo/): E-E-A-T stands for Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness. Learn what each component means and how to demonstrate it to improve your rankings.
- [What is Entity SEO](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/what-is-entity-seo/): Entity SEO is the practice of helping search engines understand who you are, not just what you publish. Learn how to build entity authority that improves rankings and AI citations.
- [What is LLM Optimisation](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/what-is-llm-optimisation/): LLM optimisation is the practice of making your content visible in AI-generated answers from ChatGPT, Bing Copilot, and Perplexity. Learn what it involves and why it matters.
- [Why Your Competitor Ranks Higher Than You](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/why-competitor-ranks-higher/): I manage 44 sites. Here are the 6 real reasons a competitor outranks you — and a diagnostic framework to find which one applies to yours.
- [WordPress vs Webflow](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/wordpress-vs-webflow/): Choosing between WordPress and Webflow affects your SEO capabilities, development costs, and long-term flexibility. Here's what matters for business websites.
